entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content: Thank you for your answer. Could you provide a setup tutorial and example so I can know how to do it manually? Thanks

entry.title: Shift Scenarios in SAP SF Time Tracking
entry.content:
We are facing an issue with shift regularization where employees work a different shift than assigned, leading to incorrect attendance records.

 

Issue Details:

 

We have the following shift patterns:

 

6 AM – 2 PM

2 PM – 10 PM

10 PM – 6 AM

 

Employees have the flexibility to regularize their shifts. However, in many cases, when an employee is assigned to a particular shift but works in a different one, their attendance is being incorrectly captured under the assigned shift instead of the actual worked shift. This type of issue we are facing in most of the employee who work in these shifts.

 

Example:

Employee “10002745” was assigned to the night shift (10 PM – 6 AM) on March 22, but instead, they worked the morning shift (6 AM – 2 PM) on March 23. Their punches were recorded as:

 

In-time: 5:41 AM

Out-time: 2:14 PM

 

The system incorrectly considered the 5:41 AM punch under the previous night shift (March 22, 10 PM – 6 AM) instead of the actual morning shift (March 23, 6 AM – 2 PM). Due to this, the employee's attendance records for March 22, 23, and 24 are completely incorrect.

 

If we are doing the shift regularization system still not able to correct these records.

 

Important note: We cannot use Round off Option because client want actual punch to be records in the system.

We have below Question that we need solution or best practice.

 

Question : 1àHow can we prevent the system from incorrectly mapping attendance punches to the wrong shift?

 

Question: 2à we can configure the system so that if punch is recorded after a defined threshold time it is considered under the next shift instead of the previous shift. Is there any standard system setting or workaround.

 

Question: 3à Is there an alternative configuration or rule we can apply to ensure attendance is captured correctly based on actual worked shifts rather than assigned shifts?

entry.title: Re: Credit Management Migration Cockpit - Further information issue
entry.content: Hello,is there any new update about this problem? i have the same problem and i can't add new lines. can you help me?

entry.title: Re: Quarterly Release Highlights: SAP BTP Security and Identity & Access Management
entry.content:
Hello,
I find information about the CIS Release schedule, this note and related links:  https://me.sap.com/notes/3409744
The "what's new" at the moment for me shows updates through April 8.  This link: https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-identity-services/cloud-identity-services/what-s-new-for-identity-authentication 
I find this SAP community post about "Q1" updates.

I struggle to find details for the coming 2025.05.10 update.
Hopeful I'm not the only person with the question and you or someone can guide me to the details on future releases.

Best Regards, Wallace

entry.title: Re: Unable to find the template "automatic creation of pu...
entry.content:
Hi

Thanks for your reply!

No, it is exactly the right App, just one template existed.

I had to add the job catalog "SAP_MM_PUR_ME59N_J" in SPRO T-code SIMG.

After that, I found the template in the same App

Thanks!

Regards

Soufiane

entry.title: Re: problem with conversion to S/4HANA 2023 phase XPRAS_A...
entry.content: You don't need to activate the embedded BW if you don't want to - you can also use the named transaction RSZTABLES and delete the object from the check result by doubleclicking it. Then you get a new window which has a deletion option. We used this as we don't use the embedded BW in our system.

entry.title: Pessimistic Locking between different OData-Requests with use of C_ENQUEUE?!
entry.content:
Hi Community,
we developed a fiori-app on top of a pure abap-solution for a purchase-to-pay solution from our partner to extend the reach to customers with a clear fiori-strategy.
The partner abap-solution works with SAPGui Transactions. In the past they used a separate locking table to manage the locks to their business-documents. The OData-Services of our Fiori-Solution used this table also to deal with locking.

In the newest release of our partner-solution they changed locking. The do not use a own locking-table but change to use sap locking by ENQUEUE and DEQUEUE, which means to use pessimistic locking in the transaction. The business-object is locked when starting the transaction and release at the end of the session. An administrator can use SM12 to have a look at active lockings and my manually release lockings.
Unfortunately this is now a heavy problem for our fiori-app because the OData-Requests are stateless and so locks set after reading data in the odata-implementation are automatically release when the request is finished. The are some articles in the community here which propose to use optimistic locking instead in a fiori-app with OData (for example with the usage of etag in headers). But this is only possible and integer when the hole solution is using the same locking. So it is not consistent and safe to use optimistic locking from the fiori-app TOGETHER with pessimistic locking with ENQUEUE/DEQUEUE in SAPGui transactions.

So i actually trying hard to use pessimistic locking in our OData-Backend. For this i found a blog describing how to use pessimistic locking by usage of the internal function module 'C_ENQUEU'. 

There is a nice blog which describes this: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/pessimistic-lock-in-sap-netweaver-gateway-odata-without-using-soft-state/ba-p/13477112

Based on this article i am able to the locks which are visible in sm12 and the transactions of the partner-abap solution recognize this lock and handles it the intended way.
Also i am able to release the lock with a subsequent OData-Request.

But actually nevertheless i have a big problem using this solution. If there is no subsequent request from this same user which unlocks the object the lock remains "for ever" in the system or some uses sm12 to delete to lock manually.
So my question is: How i am able to unlock such a lock from another user (the idea is to have normal request to lock if a lock still exists (which works already) and to release this lock (if its longer than a specific time). But there is the second problem: even if i'm able to see when the lock is created in sm12 the FuBa ENQUEUE_READ is not returning this lock creation date/time (only default 0-values are returned for date and time).

Any ideas are hardly welcome
regards and happy eastern
Matthias

entry.title: About scope items for material closing period(MMPV)
entry.content:
Dear [SAP Team/SAP Support],

Which scope item does the material closing period (MMPV) function apply to?
Until version 2402, it was listed in the scope item BEI (period end processing plant),but it seems to have been discontinued when version 2408 was released.

Thank you in advance for your help.

entry.title: Re: Connection between SAP SAC and Datasphere
entry.content: I tried many times to follow your steps, but could not link between SAC and Datasphere. How can do it?

entry.title: Mispunch Issue in SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Problem Statement : There is no differentiation between no-punch and single punch in SAP SuccessFactors. So in order to identify the cases which were absent (no punch) and that with single punch are not able to segregate because of which calculation of pay days is affected.

 

We can only receive data when both the punch in and out are received i.e. in pair. Hence need a solution over this. Single punch is however available on standard Timesheet UI to employees but it cannot be stored in database unless it is paired and can only be fetched via API after pairing of records.

entry.title: Re: Predictive Accounting in S/4HANA Finance (part I)
entry.content:
Thanks Daniel for clearly articulating about the Predictive accounting and it's application for Sales Orders & Travel expenses.

I am seeking some help in the context of ECC to S4HANA Migration. ECC legacy system has main scenario of sales orders transaction data that is to be migrated, sales orders that are closed, partially delivered, partially invoiced and fully open line items. And in S4HANA predictive accounting is activated. 

What approach shall we take to migrate sales orders from legacy to S4HANA, considering PRA entries shall be generated or be manually generated using the given program. ? 

Please share if you have any related experience or a view on this. Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: What's the meaning of "DB: Fetch" versus "Fetch" in SAT? (also: Open)
entry.content: Thank you. Yes, it must be the right explanation. NB: I see that the checkbox "database-related operations" in the SAT variant is always selected also in ABAP 7.58. I guess that the only solution is to use the ALV filter to filter out these DB lines from the ALV of the trace display.

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori Launchpad: New Fast and Easy Option to Adapt SAP-delivered Launchpad Content (for On
entry.content:
Hi Everyone, 

I just wanted to share the solution about this issue. There are few steps mentioned below should be done. My system landscape is: Fiori embedded, version 2022.

1. When saving in Fiori Launchpad Application Manager (Adaption mode) and facing the issue "Unable to save" -> due to missing Tile ID (not App ID) -> pls follow SAP note 3372215 - Unable to save changes in the Fiori Launchpad Application Manager - SAP for Me

2. Ensure that you have selected the Workbench Transport request during the Adaption process. -> 3583856 - Adapted Changes in Application Manager Not Reflected in SAP Fiori Launchpad - SAP for Me

3. If the Sap-delivered back-end Technical catalog, after making the Adaption, we need to run the Replication process to get Front-end Business catalog (which has the reference to back-end Technical catalog) updated. Replicate Technical Catalogs for all Available System Aliases | SAP Help Portal

I hope this helps to those who face this issue.

Best Regards,

Tuyen.

Hi Marius and Srinivasan,

first of all sorry for the late reply.

  • Does the problem (see description below) still persist?
  • Which catalog did you try out?
  • Are you working with Hub deployment (standalone front-end server) or with an embedded deployment?
  • Are you trying to do the adaptation on the frontend-server?

'However, I wanted to ask if there is a restriction regarding backend catalogues delivered by SAP as i tried to change the title of a tile or the icon and getting the error "Error while trying to save". Is this due to the nature of replicable catalogues? If this would be the case, I think we can't use the feature because we would have to adapt tiles in different ways and this would be contraproductive to keep the content manageable.

Release is S/4 and FES 2022/01'

entry.content:

Thank you for the valuable information provided. We are considering this option for uploading a lean set of project activities, based on the Activate task list for S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition 3SL. In other words: download the full list of roadmap tasks to Excel, remove the tasks that are not necessary for a specific roll-out project using Excel and then upload the tasks to a new CALM project.

Question: is the content upgrade for Activate maintained with every release, using this approach? If not, what is the recommended approach?

Thanks and regards,
Gerard

entry.title: Re: SAC Planning Layout related
entry.content: I understand that you need reporting based on two different dimensions. But can you clarify 1. what are the GL accounts used for MRR ?? is it one GL account or multiple ? 2. What are the profit centers used for NRR, MRC or NRC ??

entry.title: Re: New AWS option for SAP ODP data extraction through AWS Glue
entry.content:
Guys, 

We had a official discussion with SAP Strategy team and SAP Data architects too. Before talking about ODP also we should think from governance perspective.

Data Governance and Certified Data Product :

  • In exisitng BW while sending data to Datalake or Data mesh there - there is no restriction in data access for example in Earlier scenario is just BW alone and there is no AI related use cases in olden days.
  • Now if Datalake or AWS datamesh or Azure Datamesh connects to SAP BW and gets whole data from table to table or APIs, there is no restriction at field level and also API leven as they will get data using Standard Tables, Standard ODATA APis and if those are activated for specific other satellite purpose they can get that API catalogue in default connection and use those and download any sensitive data too. 
  • If you use NLB or Reverse proxy it will mask the internal hostname and port but you cannot restict at API or field level and its tedious activity for 100s of APis and field level.
  • Suppose if they download that entire data and train in LLM models then you can ask salary of specific employee in chatgpt or Models.
  • In SAP BDC - Business Data Cloud with Datasphere - similar to API management, API products - they have Data Products, Data Context, Data Governance with restrictions can be applied based on business or data context using access permissions.
  • At same time, once data comes into SAP BDC - you can replace BW with BDC and also get rid of ODP protocol issue too.
  • Now its customers choice, whether they use whole BDC - SAP Suite (like BDC with Datasphere+Databricks for AI+hana lakestorage) OR BDC as a warehouse + ADLS/S3 storage + DataBricks (SAP or Azure) so that you can get overall data for AI usecases with governance in place too.
  • Also you can get standard Data Product out of box and you can also join other data coming from ext apps and create custom dataset by sending data to Datasphere or else using databtircks post AI use case, you can create new data product too and rollout for business.

     

 

ODP Topic:

ODATA APIs should not be used for mass data volume. Even we explored multiple hyerscalers like Fabric Datamesh, AWS, Databricks, etc.

For example : Fabric microsoft documentation itself says it is not even recommended ODATA APIs for tens or hundreds of million records. Integrate your SAP data into Microsoft Fabric | Microsoft Fabric Blog | Microsoft Fabric

Also SAP has explained below: ODATA APIs talks at top layer and whereas ODP talks at CDS view layer.

Definitely there is a slowness if you talk at AWS Analytical ODATA APIs (in their connector documentation) or Fabric Documentations too. Since ODP is closed they are recommending ODP only.

entry.title: Intercompany Code Subcontracting Process from perspective of Supplier
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community Members, can you please suggest Steps/Processes for following SAP Business Scenario

  1. Company A and Company B belong to same Group of Companies and have SAP implemented, but each of them has different company Codes.
  2. The Company B is Subcontracting Supplier of the Company A which is the Customer.
  3. What method can be used by Company B to do GR from Company A for Processing/Subcontracting.
  4. Also, the material received at Company B should only be updated Quantity wise in its stock. Since it is valuated stock for Company A.
  5. Once the material is processed at Company B what method can be used to dispatch the processed material from Company B to Company A. This should also consider the revision of stock.

Abstract: In short, what can be the process for Intercompany Code Subcontracting Process from the perspective of Supplier i.e. Company B?

Your suggestions are deeply appreciated.

entry.title: Re: What's the meaning of "DB: Fetch" versus "Fetch" in SAT? (also: Open)
entry.content: That depends on your use case. If you are sure that DB execution time is no problem you can filter them out. But if you initially have no clue where the performance bottleneck is you better leave it in. This example also shows that you better restrict the query to what you need as transport back to ABAP layer takes twice as much time as the DB execution. --> Code pushdown

entry.title: Re: "Configure" menu not visible in Integration Suite whe...
entry.content:
Hi Charlie_Lin

First you need to assign role collections 1) APIManagement.SelfService.Administrator and 2) APIPortal.Administrator

For this you need to go to security(in btp cockpit)->Users(select your user)->Click on Roll Collections->Assign Roll Collections

Here you need to select the above two role collections.

Then clear your cache and when you log in after clearing cache, you will find API under settings in "Integration Suite".

When you click API under Settings it will take sometime for provisioning.

Finally when you log in again you will find the required "Configure" options in "Integration Suite"

entry.title: Re: Delegated User Administration Using Attribute-Based Access Control in SAP Cloud Identity Service
entry.content:
Hi @ValAtanassov 

Excellent Blog, I do have some requirement which I'm struggling to figure out.

I have segregated set of users and create a separate group for them, these users doesn't have any email id and their username = employee number

I'm trying to create ABAX Policy to reset password, unlock users only to the people consisting in this user group. I tried to match user.username = employeeNumber but it is not supported attribute

Is there way we can create policy to match users attributes = group name?

entry.title: Re: New AWS option for SAP ODP data extraction through AWS Glue
entry.content:
•  Infact, you can get all 300+ open connectors of Integration suite here as well to connect to any legacy app or satellite saas application and join that data with SAP and create custom data sets too.
  • Option-1: If you take whole SAP BDC suite then its zero ETL and everything is native including DataBricks on BTP + Datasphere on BTP + SAC + Datalake storage. No need of investing on ETL as entire stack sits here in BTP.
  • Option-2:  Suppose if customers are fancy in using hyperscalers then still you need SAP BDC for overall data source and governance for both SAP and Ext Apps and then they should use databricks. Here ETL definitely requires as you need to transfer data to Hyperscaler Azure or AWS mesh.

entry.title: Business Place for Thailand in S4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

When I enter journal entry with tax code, the message is showing " Define Business Place". In this case , I am facing that I can't access to Define Business Place for Thailand in CBC. Which business role and catalog that I need to add for this issue? 

Thank You.

Hnin

entry.title: Re: Bring your own Git for SAP BTP ABAP Environment
entry.content:
@christoph_pohl wrote:

@fabianlupa The SAP Cloud Connector integration for connecting gCTS (not abapGit!) to on-premises git repositories is currently on the roadmap for 2508 (without any obligation implied), see SAP BTP, ABAP Environment Roadmap Information | SAP Help Portal 

SAP BTP CI/CD service won't help you here, since your ABAP system in SAP BTP needs to be able to access the git repository.

Checking back on this to see if I can use gCTS 6 months later but it seems like the relevant roadmap item has been pushed back to 2602, so no. Is that feature not that urgent? In my experience many companies / industries are legally required to store their proprietary source code within their closed network so this is surprising to me.

entry.title: Re: SAC Story can we have mutiple GL account hierarchy in Single Table -1
entry.content: Do you mean same GL account is tagged under three different parent node?

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP React app - CSRF token validation failed - du...
entry.content:
Yes! Fixed the issue, thanks to my fantastic colleague in the UK.

The issue is that the approuter handles the csrf token stuff, but we request it from the backend. So using this (csrfProtection:false), did the trick. Not easy to find if you never dealt with it:

{ "source": "^/destination/S4H_API/(.*)$", "target": "$1", "destination": "S4H_API", "authenticationType": "XSUAA", "csrfProtection": false }

 

Cheers!

Laurens

entry.title: In my BTP trial account trust configuration option missing
entry.content: In my BTP trial account trust configuration option missing

entry.title: Re: Automatic Workarea Migration / Activation of Redesign...

entry.title: Discover how SAP Cloud ALM facilitates seamless change control management process (APAC)
entry.content:
SAP Cloud ALM Configuration Webinar Series 2025

We are thrilled to extend a warm welcome to everyone for our SAP Cloud ALM configuration webinar series.

Topic

Discover how SAP Cloud ALM facilitates seamless change control management process

With this session, you will

  • Uncover the fundamental value of Change and Deployment Management within SAP Cloud ALM.
  • Learn how to enable transport management for your solutions in SAP Cloud ALM.
  • Discover the core capabilities of Change and Deployment Management provided by SAP Cloud ALM.
  • Gain valuable insights into the product outlook for Change and Deployment Management.

Agenda

  • SAP Cloud ALM Overview - 5 min
  • Discover how SAP Cloud ALM facilitates seamless change control management process - 35 mins
  • Live Demo 15 mins
  • Q&A - 5 mins

Register Now

We look forward to seeing you virtually!

Stay updated on upcoming sessions!

For any further queries please contact us on cloudalm@sap.com

 

If you have any questions about the session topic, please feel free to post them in the comments.

entry.title: Re: Quo Vadis SAP PLM

entry.title: Slow update - RSM13000 (SAPMV45A/SAPMV60A/SAPMV75A/SAPMV56A...)
entry.content:
Hello guys,

in our system like 30% of V* transactions have slow update.
Example: VA01, VA02, VA22, VT02n, VT03n, VF11…

During this slow update, users are waiting and complaining.

In ST03n I can see, 
Update V1 = slow
Update V2 = fast

There is no bottleneck in Workprocesses (UPD*) or CPU usage or anything else.
There are also several instances where update request gets distributed.
Also no problem with hanging HTTP RFC connections (SAPLHTTP_RUNTIME...).
As far as I can see there is no locking problem in SM12.

Most of time is always used under "Processing Time".

The only thing I can see is high "RFC idle time"... can this be a reason (?)
Because "calling time" and "data send time" are pretty low.


ARCHIV_CREATE_TABLE_MULT


The UPD WP is remaining in program SAPLCEI3 without more information, only time counts...
and after 5-20 seconds it will finish.

 

This happens with ~30% of update requests in V* transactions.

Maybe you have some other ideas what to check?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Suppliers shouldn't be able to enter negative values...
entry.content: Hi Jeremy, thanks for your explanations.

entry.title: Re: Suppliers shouldn't be able to enter negative values...
entry.content: @Jeremy_Deo

entry.title: Enable SAP Developer Hub as central Event Catalog
entry.content:
Introduction

In a world where event-driven architectures (EDA) are gaining traction, enterprises need a central and consistent way to document, discover, and consume events. SAP is addressing this need with an exciting roadmap initiative: enabling the SAP Developer Hub to act as a central Event Catalog.

This blog will walk you through the motivation behind this feature, how it fits into SAP’s broader strategy, and what steps you can take to prepare. We'll also include some insights into the current capabilities and what’s coming next.

 

Why a Central Event Catalog Matters

Managing asynchronous APIs and events across hybrid landscapes can quickly become complex. Having a unified developer experience—where both REST APIs and events are discoverable in one place—simplifies onboarding and integration across teams.

This aligns perfectly with SAP’s vision for a unified API consumption layer, with the SAP Developer Hub playing a central role.

Roadmap Highlights

SAP has identified several key innovations in this space, as published in the SAP Roadmap Explorer. Here are some of the most relevant items:

✅Developer Hub: Event Catalog - Basic Discovery

Link to roadmap item

SAP has enabled basic discovery of events directly via the Developer Hub. This allows developers to search, browse, and inspect event metadata just like they would with REST APIs.

✅ Expose Event Definitions via API Business Hub

Link to roadmap item

This has enabled event definitions available in a reusable and standardized format, ensuring that producers and consumers can align on payload structures, topics, and semantics.

🔜Enhanced Event Metadata

Link to roadmap item

SAP plans to enhance event metadata support, offering more insights into event types, versions, and schemas. This will enrich the Event Catalog experience and further empower developers working in event-driven scenarios.

How does it look like: Event Catalog in Developer Hub

Let's do it based on one example Event from SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh to Developer Hub.

Download AsyncAPI

In SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh navigate to Designer > API Product > Event > Download AsyncAPI

Create Event Product 

In SAP Developer Hub navigate to Admin Center > Content > Products > Add Event > Publish

Discovery SAP Events from SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh in Developer Hub

In SAP Developer search/navigate to your Event

Conclusion

The introduction of an Event Catalog in the Developer Hub is a major step forward in enabling event-driven, loosely coupled architectures in the SAP ecosystem.

If you're working with events today—or plan to—this is the right time to explore the feature, start aligning your assets, and get ready to expose your events to the wider enterprise.

🔗Don't forget to check the roadmap links above for the latest delivery timelines and feature details.

entry.title: Re: CDS View Query Not showing in TCode RSRT
entry.content:
Please check the CDS API state whether it is Released or not.

How to check API state:

CDS View=>Properties=> API State

How to Make API State in Released :

Right click on CDS View => API State=>Add Use System-Internally (Contract C1)
it will open a pop-up as shown:

Just select all checkboxes and click on next.

entry.title: Re: Help Needed with Deleting Configurations in SAP AI Co...
entry.content:
Hi @SandeepAtmakuru ,

I believe there is no way in deleting a configuration once created, either from the Launchpad UI or by connecting to ai core client. Only the executions or deployments created from these configurations can be deleted. 

Cheers,

Guruprasad GL

entry.title: Termination - Time account days over
entry.content:
Hello experts,

The payout profile feature in a termination allows you to create a spot bonus with a partial or total amount of days (recalculated with the termination rule). However, if you have used more vacation days than the recalculation calculates, the system doesn't create a deduction. 

For example:

I accrued 30 days on 01/01/2025, I use 15, and on 02/01/2025 they terminate me. The recalculation says that I owe X days to the company. I'm wondering if using the purchase payout profile I can create a deduction like payout profile can do it. I think that is not possible, and the easiest workaround is that the HR create a deduction of X days in the employee profile or use some kind of integration between ISC-IC. If someone knows a better option, I would be glad to hear it.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: What are the ABAP release + SP requirements for a con...
entry.content:
Hi all,

I asked SAP directly via Ticket concerning the requirements and the conclusion is: there are no special ABAP Release/SP requirements for a connection to NW 7.50 ADS and because S/4 HANA 2023 Java ADS is based on NW 7.50 it's assumed there are none either.

Regards, Marie

entry.title: Re: Entry is not a valid supply chain unit (/SCWM/SHP_RCV)
entry.content: Hi there! I find the solution. You shold open a table which I send as screenshot before and add BSG to each shipping point

entry.title: Re: Billing Document Posted in Current year, Accounting D...
entry.content:
Please share the document flow screen shot from the respective sales order and also screen shot from the Accounting Document

With standard configuration, this will not happen and seems, some custom logic is not working as expected.

entry.title: Re: Does Recruitment support auto-delegation of workflows?
entry.content: Thanks, that clarifies! It is limited but it is at least something. We'll explore further in test in our UAT, e.g. can we tie the autodelegation for the first level manager to next manager to take place after first level managers has been off for x numbers of days off and not immediately when first level manager is off.

entry.title: Re: Internal Server Error in SAP Build Work Zone: Seeking Resolution
entry.content: @preeti_anandkar @madhav15 you can try enabling SAP Cloud Identity Services - Identity Authentication in your SAP Build Work Zone. Go to your Work Zone's Site Manager - Settings > Identity Authentication tab > tick the checkbox to consent on switch, and click the Enable button to confirm.

entry.title: Difference between Substitution and Supersession in S/4 and FIORI
entry.content:
Dear Gurus,

After reading many posts about Substitution and Supersession différences, i didn't understand.

Up to now I knew:
- Substitutions in ECC managed with Tcode VB12
- Interchangeability groups managed in APO with Tcode /INCMD/UI

I see that S/4 still refers to VB12 but added the concept of Supersessions in FIORI.

Please clarify the pros and cons for using one or the other.

Thank you.

entry.title: #SITCPS2025 O Fim da TAXBRA/RVABRA e a Chegada do TaaS: Tudo o Que Você Precisa Saber
entry.content:
Palestrante: Fabio Dezan

Título da palestra: O fim da TAXBRA/RVABRA e a chegada do TaaS

Descrição oficial: A apresentação abordará o fim da TAXBRA/RVABRA e a introdução do Tax Engine (TaaS), com uma demonstração prática das diferenças entre a TAXBRA e o Cálculo Externo de Impostos.

Quem é Fabio Dezan?

Fabio Dezan é consultor SAP MM com especialização em S/4HANA e Tax Engine (TaaS). Com uma carreira sólida e vasta experiência prática, ele é referência quando o assunto é transformação fiscal dentro do ecossistema SAP no Brasil.

Palestra técnica, prática e inspiradora. A apresentação mistura conteúdo técnico avançado com uma narrativa pessoal inspiradora, mostrando sua trajetória profissional e como eventos da comunidade SAP moldaram sua carreira.

O que muda com a chegada do TaaS? A palestra é um verdadeiro mapa para entender como a SAP está substituindo a antiga lógica baseada em TAXBRA e RVA BR por um modelo mais eficiente, conectado e moderno: o TaaS (Tax as a Service). O cálculo de impostos sempre foi feito pela fórmula 320, e agora será feito pela nova fórmula 279, com o apoio de motores externos homologados, como Sovos, Valara e outros.

Menos complexidade, mais precisão com o TaaS, o SAP passa a se conectar diretamente a motores fiscais externos usando arquivos JSON padronizados, e o cálculo acontece fora do sistema. Isso simplifica drasticamente o processo, elimina a necessidade de múltiplas regras manuais e traz clareza e agilidade à apuração tributária.

Técnicas práticas e exemplos reais. Inclusive comparações lado a lado entre o modelo antigo e o novo, demonstrando como o novo motor de cálculo reduz o número de IVAs, simplifica a pricing e permite maior controle e rastreabilidade sobre os dados fiscais.

Durante a sessão, o público faz perguntas cruciais, como o impacto do TaaS nas exceções fiscais e como se dará a manutenção das regras. Fabio esclarece que agora os parceiros são responsáveis por manter as regras atualizadas, e que a empresa pode cadastrar exceções diretamente no motor de cálculo, sem sobrecarregar o SAP.

Se você atua com SAP MM, SD, FI ou é consultor técnico, esta palestra é essencial. Além de trazer uma visão detalhada da transição para o TaaS, ela oferece insights valiosos para quem já trabalha ou vai trabalhar com o novo modelo.

entry.title: Re: Shipment text user exit during VT01N
entry.content:
May I ask what your actual question is?

Do you want to knwo what is the best/correct way to save the test in your custom table?

Or do you want to know how to implement the save mechanic? If so use google for "sap implicit vs explicit enhancements" and watch some yt videos which explain the difference and how to implement them.

entry.title: Re: DMO with System Move - the use case to change PAS host during DMO
entry.content:
Hi all,
we are just about to test DMO with System move to move AppServer to new host. We followed the instructions and setup a new ASCS and PAS on the new host. PAS installation so called  stub installtion descibed in DMO Guide. We want to exp/import in parallel and SUM manages rsync since it is SWPM 2.0 SP22. BEfore downtime we had to copy SUM dir to target and start SUM on target in parallel. But in the target System os authentication to SUM does not work. We have no running SAP PAS instance and empty HANA DB. So we dont' have an running as on it.

any ideas why SUM doesn not start. error mesage is "OS aúthentication failed"

entry.title: Need API to Fetch Customer Hierarchies in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently working with SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and I need to programmatically retrieve Customer Hierarchies (e.g., parent-child relationships between sold-to, payer, bill-to, ship-to partners, etc.). After reviewing the available APIs in the SAP Business Accelerator Hub, I have not found an OData or SOAP API that explicitly supports fetching customer hierarchies or customer master relationship data.

I have already explored the following:

  • Business Partner APIs (API_BUSINESS_PARTNER)

  • Available CDS Views and Communication Scenarios

None of these seem to expose the full customer hierarchy data as required for our use case.

My questions:

  1. Is there an existing standard API or communication scenario in S/4HANA Public Cloud that supports retrieving customer hierarchies?

  2. If not available as a standard API, is there a released CDS View or extension point that can be used via a custom communication scenario?

  3. Are there recommended approaches or best practices for handling this requirement in a public cloud environment, given the extensibility restrictions?

Any guidance or references would be highly appreciated.

Thank you in advance!

Could you let me know why this issue happened?

Thank you.

Retest the process in debug mode and see from where the price is fetched in DP91. Most probably, it would be due to some custom logic written wrongly

entry.title: Re: Configure a Logo for your Cloud Application

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Custom Accrual condition not being reversed
entry.content:
Hello,

If you want ZREP to be internal only and not contribute to the net value of the rebate, you should mark it as statistical. According to your configuration, ZREP is technically not an accrual condition type, but a rebate condition type. If you want ZRER to offset ZREP, you should use configuration activity Define and configure condition type groups for offset preceding settlements. Once you define a condition type group for this purpose however, you need to also add the standard rebate condition type RES1 and its offset RES2 to this group, because in the settlement settings for condition contracts you can either specify a single offset condition type, or a group of condition types. Defining condition type groups for offset preceding settlements is a bit tricky. You need to do as follows:

Condition Type | Condition type Offset Preceding Settlements

RES1 | RES2

RES2 | RES2

ZREP | ZRER

ZRER | ZRER

 

Hope this helps

entry.title: Re: SAP BUILD access on BTP Free trial account
entry.content: Hi Raj Priya, Thanks. I was facing the same issue. It worked for me.

entry.title: Posting only possible in periods 2025/12 and 2025/11 in company code 5000 Message No. M7053 - SAP MM

I checked in MMRV and it is not in current period like April,2025, showing directly Nov,2025 & Dec,2025 as shown below in the screenshot. I even checked in MMPV/ OB52/OBY6/OMSY/MMPI everywhere the settings are right.

Material Ledger is also in activate mode.

MMRV

Tried the all possible ways, but not resolve the issue yet. It has to come current period April,2025. Can anyone please help on this.

entry.title: AI use for reading existing SAP documentation to find the needed config solution
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts,

Pls could you advise AI tool which could search in existing SAP experts blogs, OSS notes and other documentation and help to  find correct answer to questions?

 

Example: #Dispute management documentation has over 1000 pages. But I have only some few hours to find answer to question:@How often dispute case comes do collection specialist work list and where to configure the frequency? 

I would like to ask the above question to #AI tool , which can search in OSS and other SAP documents.

 

Thank you

Best regards

Marcela

entry.title: Re: Material Ledger closing - Use different account of CO...
entry.content:
Hi guys,

but what if I want to use another account but want to keep the CO assignment?

The revaluation shall use different accounts than the original COGS splitt did to see in the accounts the actual COGS-adjustment coming from actual costin run.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: What's the meaning of "DB: Fetch" versus "Fetch" in S...
entry.content:
Hi Sandra,

if you execute the trace without aggregation you can see the relationship in the call hierarchy:

The DB FETCH Operations are children of the FETCH Operation.
In my case the FETCH Operation took 22249 µs and the DB Fetch Operations 21743 µs (19294 µs + 2449 µs).
I think the difference is different measurement points and code path lengths since 1 FECTH Operation contains multiple DB FETCH Operations.
SAT:

 

ADT:

 

Why we can not switch off Database-level operations is a different question that i can't answer at the moment.
I'll check if i can find an answer. (In ST12 you can switch it off 😉 )

Kind regards,

Hermann

entry.title: Granting End User Access to a Specific Analytical Model in SAP DataSphere
entry.content:
Hi All

i have a requirement in SAP DataSphere,  I would like to grant access to a particular Analytical Model from a specific Space to a specific user, but not provide access to other models or objects in the same space.

As far as I know, Data Access Control does not support object-level access restriction. Also, creating a separate space for each model is not a feasible option for us, as we have many such scenarios

Appreciate any guidance or best practices you can share

entry.title: Quick Start Guides on SAP Cloud Solutions for Faculties and Students
entry.content:
SAP University Alliances Team has developed Quick Start Guides on different SAP Solutions. Each Guide is an initial engaging quick intro to the SAP Cloud Solutions. All Guides have the same look and feel, structure and are based on free resources.

All Guides received the feedback from:

  • SAP University Alliances reviewers
  • SAP experts
  • Faculties
  • Students

List of the Guides:

    • SAP and Quantum Computing (New)
    • SAP Business AI (New)
    • Low Code No Code development with SAP Build
    • SAP Sustainability Solutions
    • ERPsim: A Simulation Game for S/4HANA 
    • SAP Business Technology Platform: Introduction
    • SAP Analytics Cloud
    • SAP Integrated Business Planning
    • SAP Datasphere
    • Human Capital Management with SAP SuccessFactors
    • Enterprise Resource Planning with SAP S/4HANA Cloud
    • Business Process Management with SAP Signavio

Please try the Guides and share the Guides with your academic contacts.

I've gathered some information through research, but I'm looking for comprehensive knowledge. I'm open to your valuable suggestions.

 

Kind regards,
Nedim YILMAZ

entry.title: Automating Sales Orders in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud via API
entry.content:
In this post, you’ll learn how to automate sales order creation in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud by integrating an external system using the standard Sales Order API—covering activation, publishing, and basic API testing for seamless, error-free order processing.

Implementation Steps

  1. Activate API in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud:
    • Use the Communication Management app to set up a communication arrangement for the Sales Order API.
  2. Develop Integration Logic:
    • Use middleware to transform e-commerce data into the API’s required format.
  3. Test Integration:
    • Validate API calls using tools like Postman before deploying them into production.

Activate API in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud:

Procedure for API activation via the Communication Arrangement app:

  • Before you begin, identify the appropriate API for your requirements by navigating to the SAP Business Accelerator Hub. From the homepage, select SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, then browse or search for the relevant API under the available categories.
         

  • Click on API, select All, and search for Sales Order.

          

 

  • Select the Sales Order API. 

         

  • Copy the Communication Scenario ID for later use.
         
  • Open the Communication Arrangements app from the SAP Launchpad.

         

  • Click New and enter the copied communication scenario ID, then click Create.

                

         

  • Assign the communication system that will send order details, then click Save to publish the API. 

       

          

        

  • By activating the API and clicking save, you enable the following operations.

        

  • Copy the Service URL/Service Interface.

        

  • Verify the service by pasting the URL into a browser.

        

 Develop Integration Logic:

  • Use middleware to transform e-commerce data into the API’s required format.

Test Integration:

  • Open Postman and select your client workspace.

       

  • Click Add Request.

        

  • Paste the Service URL, set authentication to Basic Auth, and enter the username and password from the communication system setup.

        

  • Use URI options to test API calls.
    Example: Add /A_SalesOrder to the URL to fetch sales order data.

        

NOTE: A communication system is required to complete the above steps. Please see the link below.

Activating the API 

Conclusion:

Automating sales order creation in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud via an external system using the standard Sales Order API delivers significant benefits for mid-sized retail companies. By activating and publishing this standard API, organizations can seamlessly integrate their e-commerce platforms with SAP S/4HANA, eliminating manual data transfers that often lead to delays and errors. The process not only streamlines order management but also enhances data accuracy and operational efficiency.

Furthermore, SAP S/4HANA Cloud’s automation capabilities, including AI-powered features like sales order auto-completion and machine learning-driven data extraction, further reduce manual intervention and accelerate order processing. These innovations help sales teams focus on higher-value activities, improve customer satisfaction, and lower operational costs.

Testing and securing the API using API keys ensures only authorized applications can access your sales order data, adding an essential layer of security to your integration process. By leveraging these tools and best practices, businesses can achieve a robust, scalable, and future-ready order management solution within SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

Please feel free to share your thoughts in the comments section below.

If you enjoyed reading this blog post and would like to receive similar content in the future, please consider following my profile. By following my profile @gaddamarunkumar , you will receive updates on new blog posts and other content related to ABAP development best practices.

Follow the SAP BTP ABAP environment Topic page: SAP BTP

This page is a great resource for staying up-to-date on the latest news and developments in the SAP ABAP environment. You can follow the page to receive updates, post and answer questions, and read other posts on the topic

entry.title: Re: DRC e-Cockpit Add a New Button
entry.content: Hi! Have you found the solution ?

entry.title: Re: TS Supply Optimizer - Demand Fulfillment Rate calcula...
entry.content:
Hello Luca,

the optimizer also gets demands from not selected subnetworks that are connected to the current selection. These subnetwork demands are also passed as independent/location demands to the optimizer and are therefore included in the location demand fulfillment rate. Hope this explains the differences in your numbers.
You can see all demands that have been passed to the optimizer in the planning run monitor.

Best regards, Carsten

entry.title: Re: Mass Data Management Support For Job Info
entry.content:
Hi @NehaMV13 ,

Any information if this should work for Event Reasons with "Position Reclassification"? I tried it out at a customer and it allows me to select the event reason, change the Job Classification and Save/Submit, but they get stuck on status "Processing":

I did get a very generic "This scheduled job failed to complete" email about it:

But the status remains on "Processing".

When I use the same change on a different Event Reason, one without Position Reclassification, it does seem to work just nicely.

I couldn't find anything about this in the release notes or implementation guide, whether it is supported or not, hence me asking here first.

Thanks in advance.

Kr,

Bram

entry.title: Introducing the New Project Creation Wizard within SAP Build Lobby
entry.content:
Introduction:

We are pleased to announce the launch of an enhanced Project Creation Wizard in the SAP Build Lobby, designed to accelerate and streamline your project initiation processes. This new tool reflects our commitment to incorporating user feedback and optimizing your interaction with SAP Build. 

Background: 

To better understand user needs, we conducted extensive research involving interviews with a diverse group of users.  

A common theme in user feedback highlighted the need for a more intuitive project creation flow, starting with the user's objective before progressing to tool selection. Users expressed interest in new capabilities directly accessible from the Lobby, such as Node.js Full Stack and Java Full Stack options. 

Different Project Creation Options

Our findings guided us in redesigning the project creation process to align with user preferences and streamline the initial steps. 

What’s New? 

  • Intent-Based Navigation: The redesigned Project Creation experience prioritizes the user's goals and required tasks. Relevant project types are grouped logically to facilitate easier and faster selection, ensuring intuitive project management. 
  • Consistent Experience: In line with Fiori UX guidelines, we offer a seamless and consistent experience across the Project Creation Wizard and Extensibility Wizard. This step-by-step approach provides clarity and guidance, helping users make informed choices regarding their unique scenarios. 
  • Modern Look & Feel: Project creation options are categorized by Objectives, Categories, and Types, assisting developers in locating the right tools promptly. This organization allows for future expansion with additional capabilities. 

Next Steps: 

We value your input and invite you to share your experience with the new Project Creation Wizard. Your feedback is crucial for continued improvement. Use the "Share Product Feedback" option and click the "Give Feedback" button to let us know how this updated experience supports your professional objectives. 

Feedback

 

For more information, please visit SAP Help Documentation. 

We look forward to enhancing your project creation journey with SAP Build and ensuring our tools meet your business needs effectively. 

Already tried it? Please feel free to share your thoughts also in the comments below!

entry.title: Re: Posting only possible in periods 2025/12 and 2025/11...
entry.content:
Questions:

  • Does it happen in a productive system,
  • Is material ledger activated,
  • Can you display table changes on MARV or V_001_MARV with SCU3,
  • Did someone use MMPV (RMMMPERI), MMRV (SAPMM03Y) or OMSY (SAPL0MM2).

Read carefully KBA 2042164 - MMPV Period shifted by error to future period for Material Ledger active plant (RMMMINIT)

entry.title: Re: SAP BODS/IS upgrade from 4.2 SP14 to 4.3 SP03
entry.content: Thank you for the detailed steps on the versions and installation procedure. I have a similar configuration with SUSE 12.3 and SAP DS 4.2 SP14 with Oracle 19c for CMS in my current installation. I wanted to upgrade to SAP DS 4.3 but SAP DS 4.3 is not compatible with SUSE 12.3. I have to do a completely new installation. Our new test and production servers are already installed with SUSE 15.5 version of OS. When I check PAM for compatible versions PAM does not show SUSE 15.5, it has SUSE 15.2, 3, 4, and 6 but not 5. Should I go ahead and install the versions that are compatible with SAP DS 4.3 SP3 Patch 6 or should I ask my OS to be upgraded to 15.6?

scenario :

entry.title: Journal Voucher Posting Error in Postman – Invalid TaxGroup Value
entry.content:
Hi Ankit,

Good afternoon.

I’m trying to post a journal voucher using Postman, but I keep receiving an error. Below is the JSON payload I used and the error message I received.

JSON Payload:

{
"ReferenceDate": "2025-04-14",
"DueDate": "2025-04-14",
"TaxDate": "2025-04-14",
"Memo": "JE - Subsidy & Travel",
"JournalEntryLines": [
{
"AccountCode": "607403",
"Debit": 100.00,
"Credit": 0,
"LineMemo": "Subsidy UK",
"TaxGroup": "I1"
},
{
"AccountCode": "607400",
"Debit": 200.00,
"Credit": 0,
"LineMemo": "Travelling UK",
"TaxGroup": "I1"
},
{
"AccountCode": "115418",
"Debit": 360,
"Credit": 360,
"LineMemo": "LuLu"
}
]
}

Error Message:

{
"error": {
"code": -5002,
"message": {
"lang": "en-us",
"value": "10000415 - Linked value I1 does not exist"
}
}
}

It looks like the error might be related to the TaxGroup value "I1". Could you please check if this value is valid or help me understand what's going wrong?

Thanks for your support.

Best regards,

Urvish

entry.title: Re: if the next order is processed in VF01 SAP, an invoic...
entry.content:
How old is your system, a similar error was corrected in 2019 ?

  • 2849574 - Billing documents can be saved several times

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502.2: Final What's New & Product Assistance available
entry.content:
With immediate effect, the final What's New information for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502.2 is now available.

To access the final What’s New information, please use the What’s New Viewer.

In addition, the final Product Assistance (aka Application Help) for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502.2 is available. Please use the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Help Portal page to access it.

Note that the user assistance content is now available in 39 languages. You can benefit from real-time machine translations through SAP Translation Hub. Use the language menu to select your preferred language on the SAP Help Portal.

For you as a customer, we recommend to also use the Release Assessment and Scope Dependency (RASD) tool.

The Release Assessment and Scope Dependency (RASD) tool provides you with a personalized and tailored view on What’s New information based on the activated and used scope within your system. The information for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502.2 will be available in RASD within the next few days. A valid Customer S-user ID is required for login. We recommend to use RASD to prepare for upgrades and updates of your system and to focus on the new and changed features that are relevant for you as a customer.

You can use the commenting feature for What’s New. With this feature, authors can evaluate your feedback and incorporate it into the documentation, if needed. We hope that by opening this channel of communication, we can learn how to further improve our What’s New content for you. To use this feature, you need to be logged into the Help Portal. The feature will only be available in the English version of the documents. To learn more about how the feedback process works in SAP Help Portal, see Giving Documentation Feedback.

entry.title: Re: Suppliers shouldn't be able to enter negative values...
entry.content:
I'm only specialized on the FI side and ECC/S4 hana cloud public version for this topic but I've done some researches on the web and found something talking about "Custom Validation Rules".

Is it something you have heard of ?

entry.title: Re: if the next order is processed in VF01 SAP, an invoic...
entry.content: S4HANA ON PREMISE 1909 ABAP PLATFORM 1909 SAP S/4HANA FOUNDATION 1909 SAP FIORI FOR S4HANA 1909
